Variables.Name: Height
Variables.Description: The height at which to kill the particle.

Variables.Name: bAbsolute
Variables.Description: If true, the height should be treated as a world-space position.

Variables.Name: bFloor
Variables.Description:
If true, the plane should be considered a floor - ie kill anything BELOW it.
	 	If false, if is a ceiling - ie kill anything ABOVE it.

Variables.Name: bApplyPSysScale
Variables.Description: If true, take the particle systems scale into account
